passive.name: Break the Mold
passive.description: Rell's Attacks and Abilities deal additional magic damage and steal Armor and Magic Resist on hit.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Rell}} basic attacks reduce the target's {{sti|ar|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|magic resist}}}} for a few seconds. Basic attacks against enemy {{tip|champions}} will refresh the duration for all nearby afflicted enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Rell''' gains {{sti|ar|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resist}}}} equal to the sum reduced from all afflicted enemies, ''Break the Mold's'' damage is increased by the sum resistances reduced from the target.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Rell's''' [[basic attack]]s and [[ability|abilities]] against non-{{tip|minions}} reduce the target's {{sti|ar|{{as|armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|magic resistance}}}} by 2% for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 5 times for a maximum of 10% reduction.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Rell''' gains {{as|'''bonus''' armor}} and {{as|'''bonus''' magic resistance}} equal to the sum resistances reduced from all afflicted enemies.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Break the Mold'' will reduce the target's {{as|armor}} and {{as|magic resistance}} by a minimum of {{pp|0.8 to 2 for 8|1;3;5;8;10;12;15;17}}.
wiki_detail.description4: '''Rell's''' {{tip|attack windup}} is reduced{{ft|by {{pp|100-(0.42 to 0.39)/0.42*100|key=%}}.|to {{pp|((0.42 to 0.39)/2)*(1/{{ccd|Rell|as_base}})|round=3}} seconds (with 0% bonus attack speed).}}

Q.name: Shattering Strike
Q.description: Rell deals magic damage to units in a line, breaking their shields and stunning them.
Q.tooltip: Rell thrusts her lance, Stunning targets for {{ stunduration }} seconds, destroying all Shields, and dealing {{ damage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rell}} thrusts her lance in the target direction that destroys damage {{tip|shield|shields}} of enemies hit before dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' thrusts her lance in the target direction, {{tip|lunge|lunging}} forward 100 units and destroying the damage-mitigating {{tip|shield|shields}} of all enemies hit (excluding the shields of {{tip|monsters}}) before dealing them {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{fd|0.75}} seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* '''Rell''' is {{tip|lockout|locked out}} of moving, attacking, and casting any other ability for {{fd|0.35}} seconds after ''Shattering Strike'' is cast.

W.name: Ferromancy: Crash Down
W.description:
Mounted: Rell Dismounts, crashing down in her armor, Knocking enemies up and gaining a large Shield. While dismounted, she gains Armor, Magic Resist, Attack Speed, and Attack Range, but is Slowed.

Dismounted: Rell forms her Mount, gaining a burst of speed and Knocking Up the next enemy she attacks.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' becomes {{sbc|Dismounted}} and {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the target location, gaining a {{tip|shield}} that lasts until destroyed or casting ''{{ai|Ferromancy: Mount Up|Rell}}''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon arrival, she deals {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks up}} nearby enemies. She will continue {{tip|dash|sliding}} forward to affect further enemies along her path.
wiki_detail.blurb3: While '''Rell''' is {{sbc|Dismounted}}, she can cast ''{{ai|Ferromancy: Mount Up|Rell}}''. She will revert to {{sbc|Mounted}} form after {{si|Recall|recalling}} or respawning.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' becomes {{sbc|Dismounted}} and {{tip|dash|leaps}} to the target location over the cast time, granting herself a {{tip|shield}} that lasts until destroyed or casting ''{{ai|Ferromancy: Mount Up|Rell}}''. Upon arrival, she deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for 1 second. She will continue {{tip|dash|sliding}} forward another 320 units over {{tt|{{fd|0.5}} seconds|Estimated}}, though not through terrain, affecting further enemies along her path.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Shield Strength|{{ap|15|40|65|90|110}} {{as|(+ 12% of '''maximum''' health)}}}}
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|60 to 180}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: While '''Rell''' is {{sbc|Dismounted}}, she can cast ''{{ai|Ferromancy: Mount Up|Rell}}''. Upon completing a {{si|Recall}} channel or respawning, '''Rell''' will automatically revert to {{sbc|Mounted}} form without casting the ability and reset ''{{ais|Ferromancy: Mount Up|Rell}}'' {{sti|cooldown}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''This ability can be cast only while Rell is {{sbc|Mounted}}. '''Rell''' can cast {{ai|Magnet Storm|Rell}} during the dash, and is not considered to be dismounted until after the leap ends. Ferromancy: Crash Down will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.video:
|notes        = 
* '''Rell''' {{tip|dash|slides}} between 250 and 350 units in testing, depending on how far the spell was targeted. It is not known where this is intended.
* If '''Rell''' dashes before a wall on the map, the slide will cover a shorter distance to the terrain over the same time, moving slower.
** {{pending for test}} Interaction with player-made walls.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Rell''' is dashing/in cast time:
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast={{ai|Q|Rell}} is disabled. {{ai|E|Rell}} and {{ai|R|Rell}} are usable.|items=true,,,false|spells=true,false,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}

E.name: Full Tilt
E.description:
Passive: Rell gains out of combat Move Speed.

Active: Rell and an ally gain ramping Move Speed, doubled toward enemies and each other. Her next Attack explodes, dealing magic damage.
E.tooltip: Rell and an ally charge, gaining {{ minms*100 }}% Move Speed, increased to {{ maxms*100 }}% when facing enemy champions or each other for {{ duration }} seconds. Rell's next Attack or Shattering Strike explodes in an area for {{ maxhealthdamagecalc }} max Health magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive - Mounted Alacrity:}} '''Rell''' gains {{as|{{pp|5 to 20 for 6;24 to 40 for 5;45;50}} '''bonus''' movement speed}}, reduced{{ft|by 50%|to {{as|{{pp|2.5 to 10 for 6;12 to 20 for 2.5;22.5;25}}|ms}}}}while in combat.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' powers up herself and the target allied champion for 3 seconds, both gaining {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} which doubles while moving within 1200 units of the empowered ally or an enemy. The {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} ramps up linearly from 75% of its maximum value over the first 2 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Initial Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|12*0.75 to 16*0.75}}%|Maximum Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|12 to 16}}%}}
{{st|Initial Rally Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|12*2*0.75 to 16*2*0.75}}%|Maximum Rally Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|12*2 to 16*2}}%}}
wiki_detail.description3: Additionally, '''Rell's''' next basic attack or ''{{ai|Shattering Strike|Rell}}'' within 5 seconds creates an explosion that deals {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}. The damage based on the target's health ratio is capped at 150 against monsters.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Bonus Magic Damage|{{ap|25 to 65}} {{as|(+ 50% AP)}} {{as|(+ 3% of target's '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: If cast without a valid target, or [[self-targeted|self-cast]], ''Full Tilt'' will automatically target the closest allied champion in range.
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''{{ci|Rell}}''' gains {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}, reduced while [[combat status|in-combat]].
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' empowers herself and an ally with {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} for a few seconds, which is increased when moving near the empowered ally or an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Rell's''' next basic attack or {{ai|Shattering Strike|Rell}} within 5 seconds will also explode, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies.

R.name: Magnet Storm
R.description: Rell explodes in a magnetic fury, violently Pulling nearby enemies toward herself. Then Rell constantly Drags nearby enemies toward herself for a short while, dealing magic damage over time.
R.tooltip: Rell explodes in a magnetic fury, violently Pulling nearby enemies towards herself. Then Rell constantly Drags nearby enemies towards herself and deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage over the next {{ duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Rell}} erupts in magnetic fury, {{tip|airborne|pulling}} nearby enemies inward. She then emits a {{tip|Kinematics|Kinematic}} field that continually deals {{as|magic damage}} over a short time.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|Kinematics|nolink=true}}:}} Kinematics drags enemies toward the '''Source''', but does not disable their actions nor intercept other forms of movement.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Rell''' erupts with magnetic fury, {{tip|airborne|pulling}} nearby enemies {{tt|inward|to a ring 225 units around Rell, but minimum 100 pull distance}}. She then creates a gravitational field around her for the next 2 seconds that deals {{as|magic damage}} every {{fd|0.25}} seconds to nearby enemies and {{tip|kinematics|drags}} them towards her.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Magic Damage Per Tick|{{ap|15 to 35}} {{as|(+ {{fd|13.75}}% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|120 to 280}} {{as|(+ 110% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.target range: |effect radius= {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|450|Initial knockup radius}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|375|Continous effect radius, center to edge}}
wiki_detail.inner radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|225|Pulls target into at least this radius, continuous kinetics does not affect targets already in this radius}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|300|Kinematic attraction speed, in units per second}}
wiki_detail.video:
|notes        = 
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* ''Magnet Storm'' will '''not''' drag units that are:
** {{tip|Dash|Dashing}}.
** Being displaced (e.g. by {{tip|airborne}} effects)
** {{tip|Attach|Attached}}.
** {{tip|Displacement immune|Displacement immune}}.
** {{tip|cc-immune|Immune to crowd control}}.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will block the initial {{tip|airborne|pull}} but not the dragging effect.
